conversations.content: Write a simple Dockerfile for a Python app

args.content:
FROM python:3.10-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt
CMD ["python", "main.py"]

setup(
    name="myproject",
    version="0.1.0",
    packages=find_packages(),
)
